name: compliance closed-loop validation verifies the synthetic control mapping is present in controls.yaml
command: mkdir -p compliance && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/closed-loop-validate.sh" --synthetic-framework test-fw --controls-out compliance/controls.yaml 2>out.txt && grep -q 'framework: test-fw' compliance/controls.yaml && grep -q 'verify=control_mapping_present' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
